Marl Kastane  

Quest NPC
  • View
  • History
  • Media
  • Discuss
  • Tools
    • Main page
    • Print this page
    • What links here
    • Recent changes
    • Wiki search


Uploaded August 27th, 2009 by Tobynn
Updated August 30th, 2011

  • This mob spawns at 110, 2135.
  • Mob sees through invisibility: Yes

Categories: EverQuest | Templatized
This page last modified 2021-02-11 03:06:46.

Level: 65
Expansion:
NPC Added: 0000-00-00 00:00:00
NPC Last Updated: 2022-01-30 08:11:27
Items Given:
Seal of Kastane
Dark Shroud
Will of Innoruuk

Known Habitats:
  Toxxulia Forest
Quests:
  Shadowknight Epic: Innoruuk's Curse

Report a correction

Post Comment
Spawn Timer
QuoteReply
# Sep 10 2020 at 11:40 PM Rating: Good
ChipBoundary85
1 post
He spawned at 4:15pm EST on Aradune on 9/10. Someone showed me chat log of it as I had logged out 4 minutes before he spawned. I sat around and waited for him to spawn again and he spawned at 1:25am EST on Aradune on 9/11. Now, the people that saw him spawn initially, left him up, but I personally came back 2 hours and 15 minutes after his spawn time to find him not up. So the spawn timer could've been anywhere between 7ish to 9ish hours. I know patch notes said they added variability, but not sure how much. Hope this helps some people!
▲ Page top
Spawn Timer
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2023 at 11:36 PM Rating: Decent
flygirl1
Scholar
28 posts
I had to wait for him to respawn to turn in my wrappings. I am not sure how long he was actually down, but it was at least 4 hours from when I first showed up until I logged back in to see if he had respawn. This includes a number of logins to check to see if he was up, and he wasn't. Finally on the last log check before going to bed, he was there. He despawned after my turn in. So, I am not sure how long, for sure, he was despawned, but it was at the very least 2 hours.
▲ Page top
Game Update Notes: August 15, 2018
QuoteReply
# Aug 20 2018 at 6:31 AM Rating: Excellent
Drewinette
View User Forum
1,658 posts
From Game Update Notes: August 15, 2018 :
Quote:
Innoruuk's Curse - Made the following changes to Marl Kastane:
- When given the Note to Marl, Marl will no longer despawn and respawn as a new version of himself with fewer dialogues and an inability to receive the Note to Marl again.
- When given the Blood of Kyrenna, Marl will no longer despawn.
- Reduced the respawn time and added a respawn variance to Marl.
- Reduced the initial spawn delay of Marl.
▲ Page top
Game Update Notes: August 15, 2018

folks
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2013 at 2:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592793297635
3 posts
DO NOT DO YOUR HAND-INS TO MARL UNTIL YOU HAVE THE CORRUPTED GHOULBANE.

All you will accomplish is griefing/blocking SK's who are further ahead of you in the quest.

Many Sk's will do the hand-ins with Marl and despawn him, only to give up on the quest because getting the BoA and Soul Leech is 'hard'.
▲ Page top
confirmed

▲ Page top
Spawn time. Location (tbs)
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2009 at 3:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591804057793
11 posts
The Map for toxxulia forest that you can get from Mapfiend has his current location marked on it. He's parked right next to the two Kerrans that stand straight out from the big white building in the northwest area of Kerra Isle. *Just a bit to the right of where the Banished Kerran and Maugarim are also marked. 36 hours is about right for the time between his apperances, and he poofs with each turn in. So you have to visit him twice.
▲ Page top
I'm stuck here
QuoteReply
# Jan 05 2009 at 8:25 PM Rating: Decent
Enferm
5 posts
This screenshot doesn't show up as a real place anymore, the location is right up against the wall of this part of the village and there is no longer a little hut. Does he still spawn on the same location or is it elsewhere? I'm looking around and can't find him, I assume he's not up, but I find it hard to believe anyone else is doing this quest as everything else has been up for me so far.

▲ Page top
Sighting since revamp?
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2007 at 11:51 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591925338980
3 posts
NW section of the Kerrans is correct on Kerra Isle. He is marked on the map correctly too. His respawn time is a verified 36 RL (RL= real life or REALLY LONNGG!!..whichever you prefer) hours! ...and you do have to wait for him each time you do a turn in. One good thing, it is 36 hours on the dot he respawns. So if you know last sighting you will know when he will be there next...

Hope this helps
▲ Page top
Sighting since revamp?
QuoteReply
# Mar 01 2007 at 12:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1641169140320
3 posts
He's in the NW section, standing a short ways a from white building. Loc is 112, 2137.

Have waited for this dude for a good while now.
The despawn is because of peeps using him for faction killing so he is not camped all the time.

▲ Page top
Spawn
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2005 at 8:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592766964926
1 post
The Epic 1.0 is usually meant to be done in order, by that it means that if you hand in Glohnor's head to Gerot Kastane , that will trigger Marl Kastane to spawn thereafter. Hope this helps, confirmed today at 3PM PST.
▲ Page top
RE: Spawn
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2005 at 7:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362349198
18 posts
Actually I found this twice while doing my 1.0 that if you turn something in to Marl Kastane, that he despawns and respawns around 36 hours later (I waited about a day and a half IRL). Even when I turned the Glohnor's Head to Gerot Kastane, Marl did not spawn. It's really kind've a pain having to wait 36 hours just to do a stupid turn in lol.
▲ Page top
RE: Spawn
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2005 at 10:59 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591830917415
8 posts
I despawned him at 6am by turning in the blood to get the shroud. I went into the hole that afternoon killed mummy turned in the head and Marl has still not spawned 30 hours later. It has only been about 18 since I turned in the head to Gerot though. This despawning is very aggravating but I am almost done with it. Anyone happen to have a rough guess at his spawn time?

# Sep 13 2004 at 1:24 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781922268

I have a Loc on him. He is in the upper left corner of the zone in the Kerra Village. His loc is Pos 573 pos 62. You will have to invis to his hut or kill alot of green Kerras. Hope this helps

i couldnt agree more that this guy is pure BS. its realy stupid to have an epic npc depop after a hand in. this guy will despawn after two different hand ins on the sk epic, once on the hand in of the items recieved from kyrena and also on the hand in of the wrappings from glohnor. so 99% of the time this guy is not up.
